<?php namespace Spatie\Feed\Helpers; class Cdata { public static function out(string $data): string { // See https://www.w3.org/TR/REC-xml/#dt-cdsection $replace = [ '<!CDATA[' => '', // CDATA cannot be nested. ']]>' => ']]&gt;', // CDEnd needs to be escaped. ]; return '<![CDATA[' . str_replace(array_keys($replace), array_values($replace), $data) . ']]>'; } }
